Class DRMeterPlot

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.DRMeterPlot
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIMeterPlot, DRIPlot, Serializable
public class DRMeterPlot extends Object implements DRIMeterPlot

DRMeterPlot class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
